subject: Grimmsnarl, a large dark-furred Pokemon whose long black hair wraps and coils around its body like tendrils, with visible pink-magenta skin beneath, standing in a menacing low crouch
description: A hulking, dark-furred Pokemon dominates the frame in a low, aggressive stance. Its defining feature is a mass of long black hair-like tendrils that wrap around its limbs and body, partially obscuring its pink-magenta skin. The face is visible — with an unsettling, sneering expression and glowing eyes. The background is dark and shadowy with indistinct forest-like foliage, reinforcing a sinister and mysterious atmosphere. No weapons or tools are present; the creature's threat is entirely physical and conveyed through mass, posture, and expression.
foreground: Grimmsnarl in low aggressive crouch, hair tendrils splayed outward
emotion: menacing, sneering — hunched posture, glowing eyes, bared expression
